title: Head of Revenue Operations
location: Tel Aviv, Israel / New York (globally distributed)
description: Finout is a cloud cost management SaaS company (backed by $85M+, customers include The New York Times, Wiz, Elastic and Lyft) seeking a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO. The role requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling revenue operations beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance and HR while collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps with demonstrated expertise in Salesforce administration, pipeline forecasting, and scaling revenue operations aligns perfectly with Finout's Head of RevOps requirements. The Tel Aviv HQ location with global distribution matches his preferred geography, and the company's $85M+ funding and high-growth trajectory are ideal for a senior RevOps executive.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and immediately thought of you—their cloud cost management platform serving Fortune 500 companies like The New York Times and Wiz is exactly the type of high-growth B2B SaaS environment where your 15+ years scaling RevOps infrastructure would create immediate impact. With your deep Salesforce expertise and track record scaling revenue operations, you'd be reporting directly to the CRO to build the operational backbone for their next growth phase. The Tel Aviv HQ with global distribution is a rare find for a senior RevOps leader in your preferred market.

title: RevOps Manager, Territory Strategy & Operations
description: Gong seeks a RevOps Manager to partner with Sales and RevOps, providing dashboards, reporting tools, and regional insights to optimize territory performance. Responsibilities include redesigning territory models for global scalability, partnering with Sales leadership, Strategy and Finance on territory composition, and maintaining territory mapping in CRM systems like Fullcast and Salesforce. Requires deep understanding of B2B SaaS go-to-market models, strong analytical skills with Excel, SQL and BI tools, and Salesforce proficiency. Salary range $149,000–$175,000 USD.
score_reason: Excellent match for Omri's RevOps expertise and B2B SaaS GTM background. Territory strategy, Salesforce proficiency, and analytical skills align perfectly with role requirements; remote US position meets location flexibility.
ai_opener: Omri here—15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps and GTM. I've spent considerable time optimizing territory models and building scalable sales operations frameworks, which aligns directly with Gong's need to redesign territory strategies for global scalability. With deep Salesforce and BI tool experience, I'm excited to explore how I can help drive regional performance optimization at a company that's clearly invested in data-driven sales leadership.

title: Revenue Operations Manager - Systems
location: Remote / Hybrid (New York, San Francisco, Salt Lake City)
description: Flex is hiring a Revenue Operations Manager - Systems for its New Verticals division. The role involves building and owning the Salesforce environment, designing revenue tech stack integrations, architecting the sales process from lead-to-close, and helping build the New Verticals RevOps function. Requires 5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations or GTM Operations with at least 2 years in a senior/lead capacity, deep Salesforce expertise, and familiarity with GTM systems such as Outreach, LeanData, Clay and HubSpot. A builder mentality is essential.
score_reason: Excellent match across all dimensions: 15+ years B2B SaaS experience far exceeds 5+ requirement, deep Salesforce expertise aligns perfectly with core systems ownership role, and proven GTM builder mentality matches the New Verticals division's need to architect revenue processes from scratch. Remote-first structure accommodates global flexibility.
ai_opener: Hi [Hiring Manager], I've spent 15+ years building and scaling RevOps functions in B2B SaaS, with extensive hands-on Salesforce architecture and GTM tech stack integration experience. Flex's challenge of architecting the sales process and owning the RevOps function for New Verticals resonates deeply—I've built similar functions from the ground up and would bring both the technical depth and builder mentality you're looking for.

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description: VulnCheck, a fast-growing cybersecurity company, seeks a Revenue Operations Manager sitting at the intersection of Sales, Marketing, Customer Success and Finance. Responsibilities include owning CRM integrity (Salesforce & HubSpot), building dashboards for pipeline health, forecasting, bookings and churn, and managing the GTM tech stack (Outreach, Clay, QuotaPath, etc.). Requires 4+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations or GTM Systems within B2B SaaS, hands-on Salesforce or HubSpot administration, and strong working knowledge of SaaS metrics like ARR, ACV, NRR and churn.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps/GTM, deep Salesforce/HubSpot expertise, and proven track record with pipeline forecasting, SaaS metrics, and GTM tech stack management make him an exceptional fit for this Revenue Operations Manager role at a growing cybersecurity company.
ai_opener: I noticed VulnCheck is building out Revenue Operations to scale GTM across Sales, Marketing, and CS—exactly the cross-functional orchestration I've specialized in over 15+ years in B2B SaaS. With hands-on Salesforce and HubSpot administration, pipeline forecasting, and experience managing complex GTM stacks (Outreach, Clay, etc.), I'm confident I can establish the CRM integrity and metrics rigor your team needs to accelerate growth.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Conveo is an AI research platform (used by Unilever, Google and Orange) scaling 20x revenue in 2026 and hiring a GTM Engineer who can code, ship, and iterate on internal tools and automations that make the GTM team highly effective. The role replaces patchwork SaaS tools and manual workflows with purpose-built apps, pipelines and AI-powered workflows — including lead scoring models, attribution pipelines, onboarding flows, and AI agents that eliminate hours of manual work each week.
score_reason: Excellent alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise and GTM automation focus; the role's emphasis on building internal tools, lead scoring, and AI-powered workflows directly matches his CAC/LTV and pipeline forecasting strengths. Remote location and scaling SaaS context are perfect fit, though the coding requirement may require validation of technical depth.
ai_opener: Conveo's approach to replacing manual GTM workflows with AI-native automation is exactly what modern revenue teams need at scale. With 20x revenue growth planned for 2026, having a GTM Engineer who understands both the operational side (lead scoring, attribution, onboarding) and can actually build it is rare—and I've spent 15+ years optimizing those exact workflows in high-growth B2B SaaS. I'd be curious to explore how we could accelerate your GTM infrastructure to match that growth trajectory.

title: GTM Engineer
description: Snorkel AI seeks a GTM Engineer to identify high-leverage opportunities for automation, AI and systems improvement across GTM workflows including lead routing, account research, deal support and forecasting. The role designs and maintains automated workflows using no-code/low-code tools, Salesforce automation, APIs and code. Requires 4+ years in GTM Engineering, Business Systems, RevOps or similar technical roles, strong Salesforce hands-on experience, workflow tools like Zapier, Make, n8n or Workato, AI-enabled workflow experience, and proficiency in Python or JavaScript.
score_reason: Exceptional match for Omri's RevOps/GTM expertise with 15+ years B2B SaaS background, Salesforce mastery, and pipeline forecasting focus. The AI-native GTM automation and systems improvement align perfectly with his strengths, though coding proficiency level would need verification.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've built GTM automation engines at scale across multiple B2B SaaS companies and immediately resonated with Snorkel's approach to using AI for high-leverage workflow improvements. Your GTM Engineer role sits at the intersection of RevOps strategy and technical execution, which is exactly where I've spent the last 15 years optimizing lead routing, forecasting systems, and Salesforce automation for predictable revenue growth.

title: Full-Stack GTM Engineer
description: August is building an 'autopilot for legal services,' helping law firms restructure delivery around AI and helping in-house teams do the same. They're hiring a Full-Stack GTM Engineer to build internal tools and automations supporting a fast-scaling go-to-market motion. The company targets the legal services spend rather than software spend, betting that within five years more than 80% of legal work will pass through an AI model before reaching a human. Ideal for builders who thrive at an early-stage, high-impact AI company.
score_reason: Strong alignment with GTM Engineer role and AI-native positioning that matches Omri's expertise. However, early-stage company size and legal services vertical (outside core fintech/SaaS focus) create some execution risk despite remote flexibility.
ai_opener: Omri here—I've spent 15+ years building scalable GTM motions in B2B SaaS and fintech, and August's bet on AI-first legal delivery caught my attention. The challenge of instrumenting GTM for a vertical shift (legal services vs. software spend) is exactly the kind of high-leverage problem RevOps/GTM engineers should own. Would love to explore how my experience building pipeline forecasting and go-to-market automation could accelerate your scaling.

title: Head of Growth Marketing - B2B SaaS
description: efficiently, a construction/design-tech B2B SaaS platform, is hiring a Head of Growth Marketing to build and scale its growth engine, owning demand generation, pipeline creation and multi-channel campaigns that drive revenue. Responsibilities include defining growth strategy across paid, organic and outbound channels, managing campaigns (LinkedIn, Google, Meta, email), funnel optimization, and overseeing the MarTech stack (Salesforce, Klaviyo, GA4). Requires 6–10+ years in growth/demand gen, B2B SaaS experience, and a builder mindset. Reports directly to the CEO.
score_reason: Strong RevOps/GTM foundation and Salesforce expertise align with the MarTech stack and pipeline focus, but the role is heavily weighted toward demand generation and paid media buying—areas outside Omri's core RevOps wheelhouse. Better suited for a RevOps Manager or GTM Engineer role than a growth marketing leadership position.
ai_opener: Hi efficiently team—I've spent 15+ years scaling B2B SaaS GTM engines and pipeline infrastructure. While your Head of Growth Marketing role is primarily demand-gen focused, my deep Salesforce expertise, pipeline forecasting background, and experience optimizing revenue funnels could add unique value in building a data-driven growth foundation that maximizes CAC efficiency and revenue predictability alongside your growth campaigns.

title: Senior Vice President of Global Marketing
description: Cloudinary, a global media management SaaS platform, seeks an SVP of Global Marketing to lead a B2B SaaS marketing organization with ownership of pipeline and revenue outcomes. Requires deep expertise in enterprise demand generation, brand strategy, PR/communications and SDR leadership, plus 15+ years of marketing leadership including executive-level ownership. The ideal candidate has a proven track record scaling marketing in a high-growth global SaaS company, understands complex enterprise buying cycles, and partners closely with Sales to drive predictable revenue growth.
score_reason: Strong alignment on B2B SaaS, revenue accountability, and global scale experience, but this is a pure marketing leadership role (demand gen, brand, PR) rather than RevOps/GTM operations where Omri excels. His RevOps expertise could complement the role, but it's outside his core target function.
ai_opener: Omri Gonen here—I've spent 15+ years building predictable revenue engines in B2B SaaS, and I've watched companies like Cloudinary scale by aligning marketing, sales ops, and GTM strategy around pipeline outcomes. Your SVP role caught my attention because you're explicitly tying marketing to revenue accountability—that's exactly where most organizations fall short. I'd be curious to explore if there's a way my RevOps and GTM background could strengthen your approach to demand gen and sales enablement.

title: Manager, GTM Operations (RevOps)

ai_opener: Omri, I came across Iru's Manager, GTM Operations role and immediately thought of you—this feels like a natural fit for your background. title: Sales Operations Manager

Requires 3+ years in business operations or project management within a healthcare SaaS company, advanced Salesforce proficiency, process improvement methodology experience (LEAN preferred), strong analytical skills, and experience with BI tools such as PowerBI, Tableau, DOMO, Sisense, 6Sense or Google Analytics.
